candidate_summary: Catalog of canonical bore-profile centroids (singular values, sigma2/sigma1, theta_QK, spectral histogram) per attention head with Mahalanobis-distance defect scoring and flea-hole half-step angle deviation, repaired via projection-loss finetune.
content_words: bore-profile centroid atlas attention head spectrum
mahalanobis distance defect score residual cluster
bulgarian rhodope gajda chanter conical bore
kaba gaida drone goatskin bag profile
seven subtle bore changes along chanter

results.name: Atlas of In-Context Learning Attention Heads
results.rationale: Shares 'atlas' and attention-head cataloging spirit but lacks centroid/Mahalanobis defect scoring or projection-based repair.

results.name: k-LLMmeans Summaries-as-Centroids
results.rationale: Uses centroids for summarization clustering, not for attention-head defect scoring or repair.

results.name: Sparse Attention Remapping with Clustering
results.rationale: Clusters attention patterns for remapping but does not score defects via Mahalanobis distance to centroid atlas.

results.name: Attention Heads of LLMs Survey
results.rationale: General survey of attention head roles, no centroid atlas or Mahalanobis-based defect detection mechanism.

results.name: Attention Head Entropy Predicts Answer Correctness
results.rationale: Uses entropy not Mahalanobis distance and does not propose centroid-projection finetune repair.

results.name: Mahalanobis Distance Unsupervised Anomaly Detection
results.rationale: Shares Mahalanobis-distance anomaly detection but not specialized for attention heads or centroid-projection head repair.

results.name: Mahalanobis SVDD Audio-IMU Anomaly Detection
results.rationale: Applies Mahalanobis SVDD to audio/IMU signals, not to LLM attention-head spectra or repair via projection finetune.

results.name: Distance-based Anomaly Detection Deep RL
results.rationale: Distance-based anomaly detection in RL setting, no attention-head centroid atlas or projection-loss repair.

decision_rationale: No prior-art result reaches the kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7 thresholds; the combined centroid-atlas + Mahalanobis defect + projection-repair pipeline for attention heads appears novel. NOTE: primary scored multi-component composition near closest prior-art collisions (Atlas of In-Context Learning + Attention Head Survey + Mahalanobis anomaly literature) at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.72-0.92, yielding 8 hits; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
